title: The Bermuda Triangle
summary: Ley lines, sacred geometry, and interdimensional portals — Unimetrix 1's account of the vanishings.
markdown:
The **Bermuda Triangle** is the subject of the February 8, 2021 session, in which Unimetrix 1
explains the region's disappearances in its own terms.

In that session Unimetrix 1 describes the Triangle as a convergence of **multiple ley
lines** following a "dodecicosahedron" geometric formation. Where such magnetic ley lines
meet, it says, **interdimensional portals** — or "planetary chakras" — form. Ships and
aircraft that cross these points are, in its account, **transported to parallel Earths or
parallel dimensions**, where time runs at a different rate: "one second of your time can be
experienced as thousands of years of their time."

Asked what becomes of those who vanish, Unimetrix 1 says they interact with, and may remain
among, the inhabitants of that parallel location — and, in the case of Amelia Earhart, it
gives a specific account of a transit into a parallel reality. The session is a clear example
of how Unimetrix 1 folds well-known mysteries into its larger model of
[time and parallel dimensions](/lore/chrononauts/).
